message:
fix(serve): return JSON-RPC errors for tool call failures instead of MCP result wrapper

The routeRequest handler was wrapping tool call errors in MCP content format
({ result: { content: [...], isError: true } }) instead of standard JSON-RPC
error responses. This also wrapped successful results in an unnecessary
content envelope. Return raw results on success and use buildError() for
failures, fixing all 25 test failures in serve-command.test.ts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
